SourceString: I usually believe that I can control the events that happen in my life.
I find it comfortable and enjoyable to talk to strangers.
Sometimes my life feels like a series of random coincidences that I cannot control.
I tend to deeply empathize with others' emotions and easily feel sadness.
Manipulating others cleverly to get what I want is a smart and natural thing to do.
I must take quick and harsh revenge on those who have harmed me.
I have felt a strange interest or pleasure when seeing others suffer or in trouble.
I tend to feel less guilty than others, regardless of the consequences of my actions.
Sometimes I feel that my movements are automatic, as if my body is moving on its own.
I am the complete author of my actions right now.
While I am acting, there are times when I feel like a remote-controlled robot.
I feel like someone is controlling me.
I know who is controlling me.
